candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate; matches Net sales values exactly and is a standard total revenue line.
Also a valid top-line revenue label in the preview, but Total Revenue is the more explicit reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost and strong COGS component.
Direct cost of purchased goods sold; also a COGS component.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost component rows from the income statement. Did not use balance sheet inventory rows because COGS should come from the income statement.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket; likely includes selling/admin/other external operating costs.
Personnel expenses are a core SG&A/overhead component.
Additional operating overhead bucket above EBIT; acceptable since no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead component rows above EBIT. Excluded COGS rows and depreciation/amortization/impairment rows.
No dedicated research and development row is visible in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Best direct recurring financing cost line. Prefer this over total Financial expenses because the latter includes non-interest items.
Looks like a financing cost subcomponent, but adding it would risk double counting because one Interest expenses row appears to already include lease interest in some years.
Broader finance-cost total, but includes non-interest items and is less preferred than specific interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected only Interest expenses to avoid double counting with IFRS 16 interest expenses and broader Financial expenses.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and therefore is ideal for BE.
Usable only as fallback if parent equity were unavailable, but it includes non-controlling interests.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Used parent equity to keep BE exclusive of minority interests.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent concept, but Non-controlling interests is the more standard balance-sheet label here.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet NCI line to pair with parent-only BE without double counting.
